articles.title: NFL combine 2026 live updates: What head coaches and GMs are saying in Indianapolis - CBS Sports
articles.description: With combine week upon us, follow live updates as coaches and GMs discuss staff changes, free agency plans, draft prospects and more
articles.content: The wheels of the offseason have turned to Indianapolis for the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine. Of course, the main objective over the course of this multi-day spectacle is to get an up-close look at some… [+3076 chars]
